matched.description: Number of workflow executions returned by the visibility query (single page, capped at limit).

succeeded.description: Number of cancel requests accepted by the Temporal frontend without error.

failed.description: Number of cancel requests that returned a non-nil error (workflow not found, already completed, etc.).

errors.description: Per-workflow failure details, capped at 50 entries. When truncated the response carries truncated=true and dropped=N.

id.description: Workflow ID of the failed cancel call.

error.description: Failure reason string returned by the SDK.

truncated.description: True when failed > len(errors[]). Always paired with dropped.

dropped.description: Number of failure entries omitted from errors[] because the 50-entry cap was hit.
